block_02: Stocks on CFDs are a way to trade on the highs and lows of the world’s major companies without actually owning the underlying share. Learn how to make the most out of this flexible trading instrument.
block_03: What is traded with Stock CFDs?
block_04: Contracts for Difference (CFDs) are an agreement between two parties to exchange the difference in price of an asset from the time a trade is opened to the time it is closed. This allows traders to speculate on the price of an asset without having to buy the asset itself.

block_10: Set the amount you would like to invest.
block_12: Buy the asset if you think its price will increase. Sell if you speculate it will fall.
block_13: Close the deal when the time is right or set up auto close.
block_15: Follow the in-platform smart news feed for major news that may move a stock’s price
block_16: Set up stop-loss/take profit to close a deal once the asset has reached a specific price
block_17: Use technical analysis indicators to forecast potential price movements
block_18: To learn more about this popular instrument, you may head to the IQ Option Blog. Or you may take what you’ve learned and put it into practice.
